workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Working on Fourth Coffee's consumption trend. Got the meeting transcript -- help me triage this.

input_artifacts.content:
From: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-09 09:10 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Fourth Coffee

There's been a change in our timeline for consumption trend. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 13:23 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Fourth Coffee consumption trend

Our team encountered some challenges with consumption trend. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 12:15 EST
Subject: Re: Re: consumption trend Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about consumption trend. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Fourth Coffee: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
